questionHtml:
What is evidence for wave–particle duality?

A.  Line spectra of elements

B.  Electron-diffraction experiments

C.  Rutherford alpha-scattering experiments

D.  Gamma-ray spectra

meta.title: What is evidence for wave–particle duality? A. Line spectra of elements B. Electron-diffraction experiments C. Rutherford alpha-scattering experiments D. Gamma-ray spectra
